articles.title: Israeli strike kills three civilians in central Gaza
articles.summary: Israeli strike kills three civilians in central Gaza An Israeli strike on Friday evening killed three civilians and injured others near the al-Maghazi refugee camp in the central Gaza Strip, Wafa news agency reported. The report said that an Israeli combat drone targeted a vehicle near the refugee camp entrance, and the bodies of the slain people, along with the wounded, were evacuated to Shuhada Al-Aqsa Hospital in Deir al-Balah.

articles.title: Trump says Iran attacks on ships violation of ceasefire
articles.summary: Trump says Iran attacks on ships violation of ceasefire Iran has fired at least four one-way attack drones at ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, US President Donald Trump said on Friday, adding that one of the drones hit the upper deck of a cargo ship. "Damage was done, but the Ship was able to proceed on its way. We knocked down three other Drones. Obviously, this is a foolish violation of our Ceasefire Agreement," Trump wrote on Truth Social.

articles.title: Trump Claims Iran Violated Ceasefire With Hormuz Drone Attack
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump said Iran firing at cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz violated their ceasefire agreement. articles.title: Ships crossing Hormuz use Oman passage despite Iran warnings
articles.summary: Ships crossing Hormuz use Oman passage despite Iran warnings Traffic levels in the Strait of Hormuz fell back from Wednesday's high, but vessels continued to use a non-Iranian-approved passage, despite a ship being struck by a projectile, tracking platforms showed on Friday. At least 42 commodity vessels - including tankers carrying oil, gas, and dry bulk such as fertilisers - crossed on Thursday, Kpler's tracking platform showed, down from a high of 57 on Wednesday.
